snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: macOS-first Note Agent current-note read-only foundation exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: Development froze the exact 16-path typed scope, conversation, Job, Pi and safe-read candidate after an independent adversarial review. Planning changed only existing owner, evidence, semantic and review artifacts, never the frozen Development bytes.

dimensions.summary: API, Context and Job owners locate the strict current-note scope, pathless preload projection, exact Job binding and read-only Pi boundary; UI remains separately owned and unavailable.
Owners agree on exact page/checksum scope, scope-isolated history, restart/cancel drift rejection, query-only first egress, fresh evidence classification and exact raw-quote citations.
Five exact selectors project only to existing API, Job, Pi, security and Context requirements/exits; semantic lock v3 has 1,222 claims while PIGE-UI-005/E6.06 and all statuses remain unchanged.
The service slice has focused/full tests, typecheck, build, Pi runtime smoke and adversarial evidence; the later compatible UI integration owns assembled Note Agent acceptance.
No document or decision is added; three owner updates, five selectors and semantic-neutral compression keep every fixed budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate service, recovery and Pi evidence
verification.evidence: Development ran focused 6 files/195 tests, full 113 passed/1 skipped files and 1,320 passed/1 skipped tests, typecheck, build and Electron Pi runtime smoke; adversarial review cleared exact 68875c66/aadbd23d identities.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The visual contract passes unchanged; semantic lock v3/1,222 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with Requirement, Exit and Phase states unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Note Agent current-note read-only service foundation
coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds an optional strict current_note scope, exact Job/page binding and read-only Pi tool over existing agent.submitTurn/conversation/model-egress ownership; no migration, dependency, setting, permission mode, mutation, Operation or UI change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 68875c66/aadbd23d bytes after adversarial review. Planning bound only existing API/Context/Job owners, evidence, semantic lock and this recipe without changing the 16 paths.

nonBlockingRisks: PIGE-UI-005 and E6.06 remain planned until the separately owned UI is mechanically integrated and read-only plus reversible mutation acceptance is complete.
Selection, related/backlink expansion, memory, attachments, editing, translate/polish, proposals, Operations and cross-note retrieval remain open.
The assembled unified-agent smoke has a stale Models selector unrelated to these service bytes; Windows/Linux qualification remains deferred under macOS-first sequencing.
